description_long: This is a medium-sized, woven handbag with a slightly flared trapezoidal shape, featuring a tightly interlaced pattern of pale blue and green fibers. The front is adorned with two green, rose-shaped decorative elements and a band of dark green lace-like embroidery along the lower edge. A short, beaded handle made of large, dark, glossy beads is attached to the upper rim with metallic fasteners, giving the bag a distinctive and elegant look. The woven texture is consistent throughout, with the back and sides displaying a more subdued, gradient green coloration. The interior appears spacious and unlined, with the structure maintaining a semi-rigid form. A small, rectangular brand tag labeled 'CheChe' is affixed just below the handle on the front.
description: A woven, pale blue-green handbag with a beaded handle, green lace embroidery, and rose-shaped decorations on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the beaded handle, 'CheChe' brand tag, green lace embroidery, and two rose-shaped decorations.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flared shape, woven texture, and the profile of the beaded handle.
description_view_2: Front view similar to view 0, with clear visibility of the decorative elements and handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the plain woven texture and the back of the beaded handle, with minimal decoration.
attribute_brand_logo: A small, rectangular 'CheChe' brand tag is located just below the handle on the front, with white text on a dark background.
attribute_strap_type: Single short handle made of large, round, glossy beads, attached to the rim with metal fasteners; not adjustable.
attribute_closure_mechanism: No visible closure mechanism; the top appears open without a zipper, snap, or flap.
attribute_decorative_elements: Two green, rose-shaped decorations and a band of dark green lace embroidery on the front; glossy beaded handle.
attribute_pattern: Woven basket pattern with gradient green coloration and floral lace embroidery.
